name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Security Software Discovery - Powershell
notes:
This Building Block detects powershell security software discovery.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: frack113
SIGMA Title: Security Software Discovery by Powershell
SIGMA Description: Adversaries may attempt to get a listing of security software, configurations, defensive tools, and sensors that are installed on a system or in a cloud environment. This may include things such as firewall rules and anti-viru


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Security Software Discovery - Powershell on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Command Execution Success

when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '%get-process%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.Description%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%-like%' AND (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\*virus*\%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\*carbonblack*\%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\*defender*\%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\*cylance*\%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Security Software Discovery - Powershell on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Command Execution Success

AND when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '%get-process%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.Description%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%-like%' AND (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\*virus*\%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\*carbonblack*\%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\*defender*\%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\*cylance*\%') AQL filter query
